installReceipt.label: GitHub UI workflow paste packet

installRows.instruction: Open the existing GitHub edit-file page for .github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml, replace the entire file with the copied template, and commit to main.
No GitHub UI edit is required for .github/workflows/joopark-drift-watch.yml; the remote file already matches the local template.

parserReadyProofFields.placeholder: [paste actual commit URL or SHA for .github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml on the default branch]
[paste actual commit URL or SHA for .github/workflows/joopark-drift-watch.yml on the default branch]
[paste actual generatedAt plus remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true, remoteExists=true, and remoteMatchesTemplate=true]
[paste actual gh workflow list proof or remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true]
[paste actual dispatchReady=true, driftDispatchReady=true, and allDispatchReady=true proof]
[paste actual verify-launch-handoff output showing safeToDispatch=true before gh workflow run]

installReceipt.parserReadyProofTemplate:
Parser-ready proof block:
pages_workflow_commit: [paste actual commit URL or SHA for .github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml on the default branch]
drift_workflow_commit: [paste actual commit URL or SHA for .github/workflows/joopark-drift-watch.yml on the default branch]
remote_parity_proof: [paste actual generatedAt plus remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true, remoteExists=true, and remoteMatchesTemplate=true]
actions_visibility_proof: [paste actual gh workflow list proof or remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true]
dispatch_readiness_proof: [paste actual dispatchReady=true, driftDispatchReady=true, and allDispatchReady=true proof]
handoff_verifier_proof: [paste actual verify-launch-handoff output showing safeToDispatch=true before gh workflow run]

Parser guard:
The parser ignores bracketed [paste ...] placeholders and does not turn this template into dispatch approval.

formFieldChecks.suggestedCommitMessage: Add JooPark candidate drift watch workflow

evidenceFields.label: Pages workflow commit
evidenceFields.placeholder: [paste commit URL or SHA for .github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml on the default branch]

evidenceFields.label: Drift Watch workflow commit
evidenceFields.placeholder: [paste commit URL or SHA for .github/workflows/joopark-drift-watch.yml on the default branch]

evidenceFields.label: Actions visibility proof
evidenceFields.placeholder: [paste gh workflow list output showing both workflow paths visible]

evidenceFields.label: Dispatch readiness proof
evidenceFields.placeholder: [paste generatedAt plus dispatchReady=true, driftDispatchReady=true, and allDispatchReady=true]

evidenceFields.label: Handoff verifier proof
evidenceFields.placeholder: [paste verify-launch-handoff status plus safeToDispatch=true before gh workflow run]

checklist: Use each workflow row's installAction and commit only changed workflow files to the repository default branch using the matching GitHub UI edit-file or new-file page.
Confirm each committed file matches the local template SHA-256.
Run the remote workflow file check until remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true.
Open GitHub Actions and confirm both workflow files are visible.
Run the publish dispatch plan until remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true and allDispatchReady=true.
Run verify-launch-handoff and keep dispatch withheld until every post-install evidence field is filled and verify-launch-handoff reports safeToDispatch=true.
installReceipt.dispatchGuard: Do not run gh workflow run until every post-install evidence field has been filled, remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true, remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true, dispatchReady=true, driftDispatchReady=true, allDispatchReady=true, and verify-launch-handoff reports safeToDispatch=true.
installReceipt.postInstallStopCondition: Stop condition: do not run gh workflow run, archive proof, or claim launch until all six post-install evidence fields are filled and verify-launch-handoff reports safeToDispatch=true.
installReceipt.text:
# JooPark GitHub UI Workflow Install Receipt
JooPark GitHub UI Workflow Paste Packet

Status: ready for GitHub UI install; not remote installation proof
Generated: 2026-06-11T07:28:21.198Z
Repo: biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects
Default branch: main
Workflow UI install ready: true
workflowUiInstallReady=true
Local target parity ready: true
localTargetParityReady=true
Plan count: 2
Suggested repo: biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects
Repo replacement hint: Replace OWNER/REPO with biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects

Paste packet:
Paste exact template content into each required GitHub create/edit page according to installAction, skip verified_remote_matches_template rows, commit changed files to the default branch, then rerun the verification sequence before dispatch.

Install commands:
1. pbcopy < 'docs/github-pages-workflow.yml'
2. open 'https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/edit/main/.github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml'

Install action ledger:
- pages: installAction=replace_existing_remote_file; required=true; openCommand=open 'https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/edit/main/.github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml'; instruction=Open the existing GitHub edit-file page for .github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml, replace the entire file with the copied template, and commit to main.
- drift-watch: installAction=verified_remote_matches_template; required=false; openCommand=none; instruction=No GitHub UI edit is required for .github/workflows/joopark-drift-watch.yml; the remote file already matches the local template.

Targets:
- pages: .github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml from docs/github-pages-workflow.yml; installAction=replace_existing_remote_file; remoteExists=true; remoteMatchesTemplate=false; templateSha256=7d47ffeb39201dacff42a52825e7988d20aa28e81d2d54dfcf628a3c1e39619e; targetMatchesTemplate=true; newFile=https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/new/main?filename=.github%2Fworkflows%2Fjoopark-pages.yml; editFile=https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/edit/main/.github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml; openCommand=open 'https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/edit/main/.github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml'
- drift-watch: .github/workflows/joopark-drift-watch.yml from docs/github-drift-watch-workflow.yml; installAction=verified_remote_matches_template; remoteExists=true; remoteMatchesTemplate=true; templateSha256=1e6f0ed82323d4762a9bd78dfff01f18ec5e2b4882ee346acabed4542e5d46f2; targetMatchesTemplate=true; newFile=https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/new/main?filename=.github%2Fworkflows%2Fjoopark-drift-watch.yml; editFile=https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/edit/main/.github/workflows/joopark-drift-watch.yml; openCommand=none

Template integrity ledger:
- pages: template=docs/github-pages-workflow.yml; target=.github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml; expectedSha256=7d47ffeb39201dacff42a52825e7988d20aa28e81d2d54dfcf628a3c1e39619e; localTemplateHashCommand=shasum -a 256 'docs/github-pages-workflow.yml'; postCommitRemoteCheck=node scripts/check-remote-workflow-files.mjs --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write; expectedRemoteSignals=pages remoteExists=true | pages remoteMatchesTemplate=true | remoteSha256 equals templateSha256 7d47ffeb39201dacff42a52825e7988d20aa28e81d2d54dfcf628a3c1e39619e
- drift-watch: template=docs/github-drift-watch-workflow.yml; target=.github/workflows/joopark-drift-watch.yml; expectedSha256=1e6f0ed82323d4762a9bd78dfff01f18ec5e2b4882ee346acabed4542e5d46f2; localTemplateHashCommand=shasum -a 256 'docs/github-drift-watch-workflow.yml'; postCommitRemoteCheck=node scripts/check-remote-workflow-files.mjs --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write; expectedRemoteSignals=drift-watch remoteExists=true | drift-watch remoteMatchesTemplate=true | remoteSha256 equals templateSha256 1e6f0ed82323d4762a9bd78dfff01f18ec5e2b4882ee346acabed4542e5d46f2

Checksum guard:
Run each localTemplateHashCommand before paste and compare the first shasum field with expectedSha256; after commit, run postCommitRemoteCheck and require remoteExists=true, remoteMatchesTemplate=true, and remoteSha256 equals templateSha256 before dispatch.

GitHub new-file form values:
(For create_missing_remote_file rows only; replace_existing_remote_file rows use githubEditFileOpenCommand and verified_remote_matches_template rows require no edit.)
- pages: installAction=replace_existing_remote_file; githubFileNameFieldValue=.github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml; suggestedCommitMessage=Add JooPark Pages publish workflow; newFile=https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/new/main?filename=.github%2Fworkflows%2Fjoopark-pages.yml; editFile=https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/edit/main/.github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml; uiInstallOpenCommand=open 'https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/edit/main/.github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml'
- drift-watch: installAction=verified_remote_matches_template; githubFileNameFieldValue=.github/workflows/joopark-drift-watch.yml; suggestedCommitMessage=Add JooPark candidate drift watch workflow; newFile=https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/new/main?filename=.github%2Fworkflows%2Fjoopark-drift-watch.yml; editFile=https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/edit/main/.github/workflows/joopark-drift-watch.yml; uiInstallOpenCommand=none

Post-install verification commands:
1. node scripts/check-remote-workflow-files.mjs --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write
2. gh workflow list --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --all --json name,path,state,id
3. node scripts/plan-publish-dispatch.mjs --live --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write
4. node scripts/verify-launch-handoff.mjs --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write --markdown

Post-install proof checklist:
- Use each workflow row's installAction and commit only changed workflow files to the repository default branch using the matching GitHub UI edit-file or new-file page.
- Confirm each committed file matches the local template SHA-256.
- Run the remote workflow file check until remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true.
- Open GitHub Actions and confirm both workflow files are visible.
- Run the publish dispatch plan until remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true and allDispatchReady=true.
- Run verify-launch-handoff and keep dispatch withheld until every post-install evidence field is filled and verify-launch-handoff reports safeToDispatch=true.

Post-install evidence fields to fill:
- Pages workflow commit: [paste commit URL or SHA for .github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml on the default branch]
- Drift Watch workflow commit: [paste commit URL or SHA for .github/workflows/joopark-drift-watch.yml on the default branch]
- Remote parity proof: [paste generatedAt plus remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true from data/remote-workflow-file-check.json]
- Actions visibility proof: [paste gh workflow list output showing both workflow paths visible]
- Dispatch readiness proof: [paste generatedAt plus dispatchReady=true, driftDispatchReady=true, and allDispatchReady=true]
- Handoff verifier proof: [paste verify-launch-handoff status plus safeToDispatch=true before gh workflow run]

Parser-ready proof block:
pages_workflow_commit: [paste actual commit URL or SHA for .github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml on the default branch]
drift_workflow_commit: [paste actual commit URL or SHA for .github/workflows/joopark-drift-watch.yml on the default branch]
remote_parity_proof: [paste actual generatedAt plus remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true, remoteExists=true, and remoteMatchesTemplate=true]
actions_visibility_proof: [paste actual gh workflow list proof or remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true]
dispatch_readiness_proof: [paste actual dispatchReady=true, driftDispatchReady=true, and allDispatchReady=true proof]
handoff_verifier_proof: [paste actual verify-launch-handoff output showing safeToDispatch=true before gh workflow run]

Parser guard:
The parser ignores bracketed [paste ...] placeholders and does not turn this template into dispatch approval.

Expected success signals:
- remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true
- pages remoteExists=true and remoteMatchesTemplate=true
- drift-watch remoteExists=true and remoteMatchesTemplate=true
- remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true
- dispatchReady=true
- driftDispatchReady=true
- allDispatchReady=true
- safeToDispatch=true before gh workflow run

Dispatch guard:
Stop condition: do not run gh workflow run, archive proof, or claim launch until all six post-install evidence fields are filled and verify-launch-handoff reports safeToDispatch=true.
Do not run gh workflow run until every post-install evidence field has been filled, remoteWorkflowFilesReady=true, remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady=true, dispatchReady=true, driftDispatchReady=true, allDispatchReady=true, and verify-launch-handoff reports safeToDispatch=true.
Do not run gh workflow run until remoteWorkflowFilesReady: true, remoteWorkflowVisibilityReady: true, dispatchReady: true, driftDispatchReady: true, and allDispatchReady: true.
External benchmark: GitHub UI file creation or editing still requires committing the workflow file to the default branch, and GitHub manual workflow dispatch only appears after a workflow_dispatch workflow exists on the default branch.

plans.name: Publish JooPark Pages
plans.githubNewFileFormCheck: GitHub file name field must equal .github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml; suggested commit message: Add JooPark Pages publish workflow
plans.remediationNextStep: Open the existing workflow file editor, replace the entire file with the local template contents, commit to the default branch, then rerun the remote workflow file check.
uiSteps: installAction=replace_existing_remote_file: Open the existing GitHub edit-file page for .github/workflows/joopark-pages.yml, replace the entire file with the copied template, and commit to main.
Commit to default branch main with a workflow-scope capable GitHub UI session
Run open 'https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/actions/workflows/joopark-pages.yml' and confirm the workflow appears
Run node scripts/plan-publish-dispatch.mjs --live --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects after the workflow appears in Actions
Treat node scripts/plan-publish-dispatch.mjs --live --repo OWNER/REPO as a template only if the suggested repo is unavailable or wrong
plans.manualDispatchRequirement: workflow_dispatch must be present on the repository default branch before GitHub UI, CLI, or REST dispatch can run it
